title: Rich Slovakian Chuck Roast Stew
description: A hearty and comforting Slovakian stew featuring tender chuck roast in a rich mother sauce base, perfect for a cold winter's night. This halal-friendly dish is sweet and pillowy, making it an energizing meal option.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium high heat.
Add the chuck roast cubes and cook until browned on all sides.
Remove the browned chuck roast from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until it is translucent.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the flour to the pot and stir to combine with the vegetables.
Gradually add the beef broth to the pot, whisking constantly to avoid lumps.
Add the tomato paste, brown sugar, salt, and pepper to the pot and stir to combine.
Return the browned chuck roast to the pot and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the stew for 2 1/2 hours or until the meat is tender.
